multiplechoiceresponse.label: In fairness-aware logistic regression, labels may be flipped using \(Y_i^{\prime}=Y_i\left(1-2 Z_i\right)\). Why does is it important to flip only a small subset of labels using \(Z_i\)?

choicegroup.choice: To avoid overfitting the logistic regression model
To ensure all groups have identical feature distributions
To reduce bias while minimizing the loss of meritocracy

div.p: Flipping only a small number of labels helps the method reduce disparities without heavily distorting the original achievement-based outcomes. Flipping too many labels could have a large impact on overall merit. This controlled intervention is central to the approach.
